message:
⚡ Lazy-load ComplianceCards (1200 LOC) via safeLazy bundle split (#10894)

ComplianceCards.tsx grew from ~255 lines (when the eager import comment
was written) to 1200 LOC with 5 exported components. Convert from
static import to safeLazy with a shared bundle promise, matching the
existing EnterpriseComplianceCards and deploy bundle patterns.

Estimated savings: ~55KB parsed JS deferred from initial dashboard load.

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <clubanderson@gmail.com>
Co-authored-by: Andy Anderson <clubanderson@gmail.com>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
